SourceProxy.name: SHYXSurfaceTipExtractor
SourceProxy.label: SHYX Surface Tip Extractor

Documentation.long_help: Identify tip / sharp points on a polygonal surface by computing, for each vertex, the distance between the vertex and the centroid of its geodesically-connected neighbourhood within a search radius. The result is stored as a point data array called TipScore.
Documentation.short_help: Compute surface sharpness (TipScore) via centroid-offset within a local neighbourhood.

SourceProxy.Documentation: Input: vtkPolyData. Output: copy of input with an additional TipScore point data array.

DoubleVectorProperty.name: SearchRadius
DoubleVectorProperty.label: Search Radius
DoubleVectorProperty.Documentation: Radius used to define each vertex's local neighbourhood. Larger values capture broader surface features; smaller values are more sensitive to fine details.
